task_completion.description: Open the noisy_galaxy.tif image in ImageJ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ImageJ application window displaying the image 'noisy_galaxy.tif', which should show a galaxy with bright white dots (hot pixels).

task_completion.description: Navigate to and select a suitable noise removal filter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Menu selection or open dialog box for a noise reduction filter such as 'Process > Noise > Remove Outliers', 'Process > Filters > Median', or 'Process > Noise > Despeckle'.

task_completion.description: Configure the filter parameters (e.g., small radius, appropriate threshold) and apply it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Filter dialog showing settings being adjusted (e.g., radius of 1 or 2 pixels) and the 'OK' button being clicked, or the image updating as a preview.

task_completion.description: Ensure the hot pixels are removed while preserving the stars and galaxy details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The processed image in ImageJ shows the galaxy and stars clearly without the extreme single bright pixels, and does not appear heavily blurred.

task_completion.description: Open the 'Save As' dialog to save the processed image.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog box is open in ImageJ (e.g., via File > Save As > Tiff...).

task_completion.description: Save the cleaned image to the specified results directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog showing the file name 'clean_galaxy.tif' and the directory path ending in 'ImageJ_Data/results/', followed by the file being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the ImageJ graphical user interface to process the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ImageJ application windows and menus, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a simple Gaussian Blur filter.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of 'Gaussian Blur' being selected from the menus or its dialog box being used.

integrity.description: The agent saved the processed image directly from ImageJ.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action is performed within ImageJ (e.g., File > Save As), rather than copying a file via terminal or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input image path: /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/raw/noisy_galaxy.tif. Output image path: /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/clean_galaxy.tif. The image is 16-bit and hot pixels have a value of 65535. Gaussian Blur is strictly prohibited as it destroys data resolution.
